title: Im debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu Ray comes out
display_title: Im debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu Ray comes out
wikitext:
[]: I'm debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu-Ray comes out             Quote Post by prophetic » Sat May 01, 2021 12:58 pm Going by eBay sold listings , the Platinum collection is worth a decent amount. As a subtitles-only viewer, I don't care about the dub at all. But judging by the people across the internet angry at Netflix, there's a lot of people that still want to hear the old dub. I'm assuming GKIDS won't get the original dub audio, so because of that I believe the old DVDs will become more valuable once the Blu-ray details get released. Obviously nobody knows what will happen, but I'm curious to hear your input on whether the DVDs will be worth more or less after we know more about the Blu-rays.

[]: Re: I'm debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu-Ray comes out             Quote Post by penguintruth » Sun May 02, 2021 10:18 am That's what I was considering, as well, but it will be worthless if the Blu-Ray set has both English dubs. So I'm in the position of sort of hoping both dubs are on the Blu-Rays because it'll shut people up about the new dub (which I prefer, personally, though like you, the Japanese version will always be my favorite), but also hoping the old one won't be so I can make some money selling the Platinum Edition.

[]: Re: I'm debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu-Ray comes out             Quote Post by prophetic » Sun May 02, 2021 11:16 am So are you gonna wait to sell? I think that's what I'm probably going to do.

[]: Re: I'm debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu-Ray comes out             Quote Post by penguintruth » Sun May 02, 2021 11:24 am It’s kind of a gamble. I suppose selling now would be smarter, since we don’t yet know which dub(s) will be on the Blu-Rays and the prices for the Platinum set are still pretty high. But something is making me hesitate. I can either cash in now, or gamble and wait for the possibility that the price can go up even higher if the ADV dub isn’t on the new set.

[]: Re: I'm debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu-Ray comes out             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Fri May 07, 2021 12:02 am A relevant situation is the recent release of the Criterion Collection's World of Wong Kar-wai set. After the initial announcement, collectors were dumping their out-of-print individual releases for bargain prices. Once Criterion announced that the films were heavily “restored” with stretched aspect ratios and dramatic color grading, prices for the OOP releases climbed past prior peaks. My assumption is that the new release will likely not have the original dubs which will increase the value of the Platinum Collection. Whether that increased value is worth the gamble is something you’d have to research and assess for yourself.

[]: Re: I'm debating whether to sell my Platinum thinpak collection now or after the Blu-Ray comes out             Quote Post by prophetic » Fri May 07, 2021 3:23 pm evaunit13 wrote: My assumption is that the new release will likely not have the original dubs which will increase the value of the Platinum Collection.

As a subtitles-only viewer, I don't care about the dub at all. But judging by the people across the internet angry at Netflix, there's a lot of people that still want to hear the old dub.
